   ],
   "type": "module",
   "scripts": {
-    "dev": "bun --filter @agentlogs/web dev",

-    "start": "bun --filter @agentlogs/web start",
-    "cli": "bun --cwd packages/cli start",

-    "db:studio": "bun --filter @agentlogs/web db:studio",

+    "db:reset": "bun --cwd packages/web db:reset",
+    "db:migrate": "bun --cwd packages/web db:migrate",
+    "db:studio": "bun --cwd packages/web db:studio",
     "test:e2e": "bun --filter @agentlogs/cli test:e2e",
     "lint": "oxlint --fix --deny-warnings .",
     "format": "concurrently -n fmt,lint 'oxfmt .' 'bun run lint'",
